## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.11

### 🎥 Cameras
- Aligns X-Sense cloud and IPC requests with the Android app v1.40.0 client metadata.
- Improves recovery when the X-Sense camera session reports `ACCOUNT_GET_KICKED`.
- Keeps camera entities available across transient camera metadata refresh failures.

### 🧩 Maintenance
- Consolidates APK event parsing into the vendored `python_xsense` parser.
- Removes the stale duplicate WebRTC signaling module.
- Uses the APK app-code length when decoding the Cognito client secret.
